text.title: Go Error Handling Patterns (Wrap, Translate, Sentinel, Log-Once) Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules every Go Error Handling Patterns (Wrap, Translate, Sentinel, Log-Once) application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Each layer wraps the error exactly once with a verb-context message: `fmt.Errorf("create user: %w", err)`.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: errorlint docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Repository MUST translate driver sentinels (`sql.ErrNoRows`, `redis.Nil`) into domain sentinels.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: ONE shared `apperror` package; sentinel vars per feature live in feature package but import from apperror.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Compare errors with `errors.Is` / `errors.As`, never `err == ErrX` after wrapping.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Go 1.13 release notes. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Log only at the outermost handler; lower layers return wrapped errors.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal log-volume reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Returns MUST handle the error — no `_, _ = func()`; CI gate via errcheck.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: errcheck docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Sentinels MUST be typed (`var ErrNotFound = errors.New(...)`), never compared by `err.Error() == "..."`.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Go anti-patterns. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold and no duplicate exists.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.

rule.statement: Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when a duplicate is found.
